listings.name: Agent Wallet — AI Agent Business Kit
listings.one_liner: Your AI agent is a business — wallet, pay, credit score, compliance log. No human merchant account.

pricing.paid_hint: pair with x402/ACP paid tools; enterprise onboarding

listings.description: MCP server that treats the AI agent as the economic actor. Three tools only: collect_payment, prove_creditworthiness, generate_compliance_log. Built for Claude/GPT/Cursor hosts. SDVOSB operator. No merchant KYC theater.
use_cases: Gov pilots needing agent audit trails

listings.name: Gov Procurement Intel — Federal Capture API
listings.one_liner: AI agent federal capture: awards, SDVOSB set-asides, agency spend, signed procurement logs.
listings.description: Federal procurement intelligence for autonomous agents and BD teams. USAspending-backed contract awards, set-aside oriented feeds, agency obligation snapshots, entity lookup, and HMAC-signed capture logs. Built by SDVOSB (UEI G24VZA4RLMK3, CAGE 21U51). Pair with Agent Wallet for payment + compliance shell. Not a cryptocurrency product.
use_cases: Agent-led opportunity monitoring with audit export

listings.name: Gas Price Tracker (Agent Micro-Oracle)
listings.one_liner: Multi-chain gas oracle for trading/agent bots at $0.01 — ACP-proven wedge.

pricing.note: If marketplace bans crypto, skip or mark infrastructure-only

listings.description: Real-time multi-chain gas estimates for autonomous agents and trading bots. Proven ACP wedge at one cent. Use when the marketplace allows infrastructure/crypto data. Otherwise lead with Agent Wallet + Gov Procurement only.

submit_order: 3) Gas tracker only if API.market allows crypto/infra data

copy_paste_short.agent_wallet: Agent Wallet MCP: your AI agent is a business — pay, credit, compliance log. npx @scriptmasterlabs/agent-wallet · scriptmasterlabs.com/agent-wallet · SDVOSB
copy_paste_short.gov: Gov Procurement Intel: federal awards + SDVOSB set-asides + signed capture logs. npx @scriptmasterlabs/gov-procurement-intel · scriptmasterlabs.com/gov-procurement
copy_paste_short.gas: gas_tracker $0.01 multi-chain gas oracle — search scriptmasterlabs on ACP or x402 /x402/gas-tracker
